title: In comments, allow a comment chain to be have status
excerpt: If items get comments, some comments usually require actions. Adding a feature to determine if a comment is “open” or “closed” would help address if action items that are being identified in comments are being addressed. …

posts.author: cia.hang.mychapter (Cia Hang)
posts.cookedHtml: If items get comments, some comments usually require actions. Adding a feature to determine if a comment is “open” or “closed” would help address if action items that are being identified in comments are being addressed.
